positive: Stylized minimalist geometric forest scene, featuring interconnected pastel line art of glowing mushrooms, whimsical flora, and curving roots, forming a repeating, tessellating pattern. The central composition is a stylized, symmetrical pathway leading to a luminous glowing core. Deep navy blue and soft mint green color palette with pops of warm coral and electric yellow for the bioluminescent elements. Clean silhouettes, high contrast against a slightly faded cream background. Ideal for repeat textile pattern, flat lay, vector style, graphic design, symmetry, elegant, ethereal, whimsical, perfect print resolution.
